types.name: Severity
types.description: Severity level of a review finding, ordered from most to least critical.

types.name: Confidence
types.description: Confidence level of a reviewer finding or merged assessment.

types.name: ReviewStage
types.description: Named stage in the review circuit pipeline.

types.name: ReviewDecision
types.description: Final decision on a pull request review: block merging, warn, or pass.

types.name: LearnerPhase
types.description: Apprentice learning phase progression stage.

types.name: OutputFormat
types.description: Supported report output formats.

types.name: ClassificationLabel
types.description: Ledger data classification label for diff content.

types.name: ChroniclerEventType
types.description: Well-known Chronicler event types emitted throughout the review lifecycle.

types.name: DiffHunk

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this hunk (deterministic from content).

fields.name: file_path
fields.description: Relative file path the hunk belongs to.

fields.name: start_line_old
fields.description: Starting line number in the old file.

fields.name: count_old
fields.description: Number of lines in the old file span.

fields.name: start_line_new
fields.description: Starting line number in the new file.

fields.name: count_new
fields.description: Number of lines in the new file span.

fields.name: context_before
fields.description: Context lines before the change.

fields.name: added_lines
fields.description: Lines added in this hunk.

fields.name: removed_lines
fields.description: Lines removed in this hunk.

fields.name: context_after
fields.description: Context lines after the change.

fields.name: raw_header
fields.description: Original @@ header line from the diff.

fields.name: classifications
fields.description: Ledger classification labels applied to this hunk.

fields.name: language
fields.description: Detected programming language of the file, if known.

types.description: A single parsed hunk from a unified diff, with metadata and classification labels.

types.name: ReviewRequest

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique review request identifier.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source identifier (e.g., file path, PR URL, stdin).

fields.name: hunks
fields.description: Parsed and classified diff hunks.

fields.name: file_paths
fields.description: Deduplicated list of all file paths in the diff.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the request was created.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata (PR number, branch, author, etc.).

types.description: The output of intake: a complete review request containing parsed and classified hunks.

types.name: Finding

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique finding identifier.

fields.name: hunk_id
fields.description: ID of the DiffHunk this finding applies to.

fields.name: file_path
fields.description: File path where the finding was detected.

fields.name: line_number
fields.description: Specific line number if applicable.

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity of the finding.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Reviewer confidence in this finding.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Short human-readable title of the finding.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed explanation of the issue.

fields.name: suggestion
fields.description: Suggested fix or remediation.

fields.name: rule_id
fields.description: Identifier of the rule or pattern that triggered this finding.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Which review stage produced this finding.

types.description: A single issue found by a reviewer in a specific hunk.

types.name: Assessment

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique assessment identifier.

fields.name: review_request_id
fields.description: ID of the ReviewRequest this assessment responds to.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: The review stage this assessment covers.

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Identifier of the reviewer agent that produced this assessment.

fields.name: decision
fields.description: This reviewer's overall decision.

fields.name: findings
fields.description: List of findings from this reviewer.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Overall confidence of this assessment.

fields.name: is_partial
fields.description: True if the reviewer failed/timed out and this is a degraded result.

fields.name: error_message
fields.description: Error message if the reviewer encountered an issue.

fields.name: duration_ms
fields.description: Time in milliseconds the reviewer took to produce this assessment.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of assessment creation.

types.description: A single reviewer's complete assessment of the diff hunks it was given.

types.name: TrustScore

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Identifier of the reviewer this score applies to.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Stage the reviewer operates in.

fields.name: weight
fields.description: Trust weight in range [0.0, 1.0].

validators.error_message: Trust weight must be between 0.0 and 1.0

fields.name: accepted_count
fields.description: Number of findings from this reviewer that humans accepted.

fields.name: dismissed_count
fields.description: Number of findings from this reviewer that humans dismissed.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last trust score update.

types.description: Arbiter trust weight for a reviewer agent, used in weighted assessment merging.

types.name: ReviewReport

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique report identifier.

fields.name: review_request_id
fields.description: ID of the originating ReviewRequest.

fields.name: decision
fields.description: Final merged decision.

fields.name: findings
fields.description: Deduplicated, merged findings from all reviewers.

fields.name: assessments
fields.description: All individual reviewer assessments that contributed.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Overall confidence of the merged report.

fields.name: trust_scores
fields.description: Trust scores of all reviewers at the time of merge.

fields.name: conflict_notes
fields.description: Explanations of any conflicts between reviewers and how they were resolved.

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Human-readable summary of the review outcome.

fields.name: seal
fields.description: Tessera hash-chain seal over the report content, set after sealing.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of report creation.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata carried from ReviewRequest.

types.description: The final merged review report: all assessments combined with trust-weighted scoring and a tamper-proof seal.

types.name: TesseraSeal

fields.name: content_hash
fields.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical JSON content that was sealed.

fields.name: previous_hash
fields.description: Hash of the previous seal in the chain (null for first seal).

fields.name: chain_hash
fields.description: SHA-256 hash of (content_hash + previous_hash), forming the chain link.

fields.name: sealed_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the seal was created.

fields.name: sealer_id
fields.description: Identifier of the entity that created this seal.

types.description: A hash-chain tamper-proof seal over serialized content, verifiable independently.

types.name: ReviewerCredential

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this reviewer agent.

fields.name: display_name
fields.description: Human-readable name of the reviewer.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Primary stage this reviewer operates in.

fields.name: public_key_hex
fields.description: Hex-encoded public key for signature verification.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of credential creation.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this credential is currently active.

types.description: Signet identity credential for a reviewer agent, used for authentication and attribution.

types.name: PolicyToken

fields.name: token_id
fields.description: Unique token identifier.

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Reviewer agent this token is issued to.

fields.name: allowed_file_patterns
fields.description: Glob patterns for files the reviewer may inspect.

fields.name: denied_file_patterns
fields.description: Glob patterns for files the reviewer must NOT inspect.

fields.name: allowed_classifications
fields.description: Classification labels the reviewer is permitted to see.

fields.name: max_severity
fields.description: Maximum severity level the reviewer is allowed to emit.

fields.name: issued_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of token issuance.

fields.name: expires_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 expiry timestamp, null if non-expiring.

types.description: Agent-Safe policy token defining what a reviewer agent is permitted to access and do.

types.name: ChroniclerEvent

fields.name: event_id
fields.description: Unique event identifier.

fields.name: event_type
fields.description: Well-known event type.

fields.name: review_request_id
fields.description: ID of the ReviewRequest this event relates to.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Review stage this event relates to, if applicable.

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Reviewer agent ID if this event is reviewer-specific.

fields.name: payload
fields.description: Arbitrary structured data associated with the event.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Human-readable description of the event.

types.description: A structured event emitted at review lifecycle boundaries for audit trail and story assembly.

types.name: StigmergySignal

fields.name: signal_id
fields.description: Unique signal identifier.

fields.name: pattern_key
fields.description: Machine-readable key identifying the pattern (e.g., 'security.false_positive.test_files').

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the detected pattern.

fields.name: occurrences
fields.description: Number of times this pattern has been observed.

fields.name: first_seen_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of first observation.

fields.name: last_seen_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of most recent observation.

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Reviewer associated with the pattern, if applicable.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Stage associated with the pattern, if applicable.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Additional context about the pattern.

types.description: A recurring pattern signal detected by Stigmergy, recorded for cross-review pattern discovery.

types.name: LearningRecord

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Unique record identifier.

fields.name: finding_id
fields.description: ID of the Finding this record is about.

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Reviewer that produced the finding.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Stage the finding belongs to.

fields.name: rule_id
fields.description: Rule ID of the finding.

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity of the original finding.

fields.name: accepted
fields.description: True if the human accepted/agreed with the finding, false if dismissed.

fields.name: human_comment
fields.description: Optional comment from the human reviewer.

fields.name: recorded_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this learning was recorded.

types.description: A single learning observation: an AI finding paired with human decision (accepted or dismissed).

types.name: KindexEntry

fields.name: key
fields.description: Unique key for retrieval (e.g., review request ID or context topic).

fields.name: kind
fields.description: Entry kind: 'review', 'context', 'pattern'.

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Human-readable summary for search and display.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Structured data payload of the entry.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Tags for query filtering.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of entry creation.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last update.

types.description: A Kindex knowledge store entry representing a past review or codebase context artifact.

types.name: ExemplarConfig

fields.name: circuit
fields.description: Circuit routing configuration.

fields.name: reviewers
fields.description: Per-reviewer configuration keyed by reviewer_id.

fields.name: ledger
fields.description: Field classification rules.

fields.name: apprentice
fields.description: Learning module configuration.

fields.name: chronicle_log_path
fields.description: File path for Chronicler JSON-lines log.

fields.name: kindex_store_path
fields.description: File path for Kindex persistent store.

fields.name: stigmergy_store_path
fields.description: File path for Stigmergy pattern store.

fields.name: seal_chain_path
fields.description: File path for Tessera seal chain state.

types.description: Top-level configuration for the Exemplar code review service.

types.name: CircuitConfig

fields.name: stages
fields.description: Ordered list of review stages to execute.

fields.name: parallel_stages
fields.description: Groups of stages that can run in parallel. Each inner list runs concurrently.

fields.name: stage_timeout_ms
fields.description: Default timeout per stage in milliseconds.

fields.name: block_threshold
fields.description: Minimum number of critical/high findings to trigger a block decision.

fields.name: warn_threshold
fields.description: Minimum number of medium findings to trigger a warn decision.

types.description: Configuration for Baton circuit routing: stage ordering, parallelism, and timeouts.

types.name: ReviewerConfig

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether this reviewer is active.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: The stage this reviewer operates in.

fields.name: default_trust_weight
fields.description: Initial trust weight for Arbiter scoring.

validators.error_message: Trust weight must be between 0.0 and 1.0

fields.name: allowed_file_patterns
fields.description: Glob patterns for files this reviewer may access.

fields.name: denied_file_patterns
fields.description: Glob patterns for files this reviewer must not access.

fields.name: allowed_classifications
fields.description: Classification labels this reviewer may see.

fields.name: max_severity
fields.description: Maximum severity this reviewer may emit.

types.description: Per-reviewer configuration: enablement, default trust, and policy scope.

types.name: LedgerFieldRule

fields.name: pattern
fields.description: Regex pattern to match against diff hunk content.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Classification label to apply when pattern matches.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of what this rule detects.

types.description: A single Ledger classification rule: a regex pattern mapped to a classification label.

types.name: LedgerConfig

fields.name: rules
fields.description: Ordered list of classification rules. First match wins per label category.

fields.name: default_label
fields.description: Default label when no rule matches.

types.description: Configuration for Ledger field classification: rules for detecting secrets, PII, and internal APIs.

types.name: ApprenticeConfig

fields.name: phase
fields.description: Current learning phase.

fields.name: storage_path
fields.description: Directory path for learning state files.

fields.name: shadow_to_canary_threshold
fields.description: Accuracy threshold to progress from shadow to canary.

fields.name: canary_to_primary_threshold
fields.description: Accuracy threshold to progress from canary to primary.

types.description: Configuration for the Apprentice learning module: phase, thresholds, and storage.

types.name: CliExitCode
types.description: CLI process exit codes mapping to review outcomes.

types.name: PipelineResult

fields.name: review_request
fields.description: The parsed review request.

fields.name: assessments
fields.description: All individual stage assessments.

fields.name: report
fields.description: The final merged and sealed report.

fields.name: events
fields.description: All Chronicler events emitted during the pipeline.

fields.name: formatted_output
fields.description: The report formatted in the requested output format.

fields.name: output_format
fields.description: The format used for formatted_output.

fields.name: exit_code
fields.description: Numeric exit code: 0=pass, 1=warn, 2=block, 3=error.

types.description: End-to-end pipeline result returned by the core pipeline, used by both CLI and MCP server.
